allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\); Get-Command rustup -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command rustc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\rustup.exe")
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;" + $env:Path; rustup --version; rustup show; rustc --version; cargo --version)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;" + $env:Path; rustup default stable; rustc --version; cargo --version)
